name: form-field
title: Field Renderer
description: Schema-driven field renderer system built on react-hook-form.

files.content:
// components/forms/form-field-v4/constants.ts

export enum FormFieldType {
  INPUT = "input",
  PASSWORD = "password",
  TEXTAREA = "textarea",
  NUMBER = "number_stepper",
  DATE_PICKER = "date_picker",
  SELECT = "select",
  SINGLE_SELECT = "single_select",
  MULTI_SELECT = "multi_select",
  COMMAND = "command",
  RADIO_GROUP = "radio_group",
  SLIDER = "slider",
  OTP = "otp",
  PHONE_INPUT = "phone_input",
  CHECKBOX = "checkbox",
  HIDDEN = "hidden",
  SKELETON = "skeleton",
  CURRENCY = "currency",
  PERCENT = "percent",
  MASKED = "masked",
  ASYNC_SELECT = "async_select",
  SWITCH = "switch",
  FILE_UPLOAD = "file-upload"
}
